comment.body: Jumping back to "6777 and 6788" here's the 1PM ET SPX volume profile (using replay)

comment.body:
on the 5minute chart, 6788 was the first rejected peak around 10 coming out of the first dip back into the daily gap, which found support at 6765.  So 6788 was a local key level looking at the charting* - if it broke through 6813 was the topside level (not quite reached) but  below was the value gap starting at 6777 with critical support at around 6765.

So even without Almas post establishing it as the upside pivot, you could see that 6788 was a key level yesterday!

comment.body:
In the AM session there was a subtle (7pt) triple top at 6813-15 (the zero gamma line on OD) showing that there was considerable sell-side pressure there.  Therefore it would take sustained buying volume to break through that never materialized - there was much more volume when 6660-5 was being tested.  

(BTW on tradingview use ES or SPY for volume, SPX volume is fake and is less sharp than either of them)
